summary: Vision pass: read the diagram for the 3 quarantined image-based ПДР questions, ground-truth the answer + skeptic

determine.imageDescription: A wide multi-lane road runs toward the horizon where a bridge/overpass (естакада/міст) spans a river. Three yellow cars are shown. The driver's car is at the bottom of the frame on the right-hand side of the roadway. From it, two grey arrows point to two candidate stopping positions: position А (circled label) is on the right side of the roadway, partway up, BEFORE the bridge; position Б (circled label) is further ahead, on the roadway right at/under the bridge structure near the river. The driver must choose where stopping is allowed.
determine.reasoning: The question "У якому з місць водієві дозволено виконати зупинку?" with options "У місці А.", "У місці Б.", "У місцях А і Б." matches official ПДР test question (manualov.net q.491 / testpdr.online q.491 / pdrtest.com 15.9). The diagram shows position Б located on/under the bridge (естакада/міст) and position А before the bridge. Per ПДР п.15.9: stopping is prohibited on overpasses, bridges, underpasses and beneath them, and in tunnels — so Б is forbidden, making "У місцях А і Б" also wrong. Position А, before the bridge, is permitted. The authoritative external source (testpdr.online, formerly manualov.net q.491 — the identical verbatim question) explicitly marks the correct answer as "У місці А". This matches our DB's markedCorrect = "У місці А.". The genConcern's worry is unfounded; our key is correct.
determine.sources: https://testpdr.online/test.php?test=all&q=491 (redirect target of manualov.net/online-test-pdr.php?question=491) — explicitly states correct answer "У місці А", citing rule "Зупинка на естакадах, мостах, шляхопроводах і під ними, а також у тунелях забороняється"; also referenced pdrtest.com/question/15.9 and ПДР п.15.9 (pdr.infotech.gov.ua/theory/rules/15).

determine.imageDescription: First-person driver's POV (steering wheel, hand, dashboard with gauges in foreground) approaching/entering a road tunnel. Concrete tunnel walls arch overhead on both sides with ceiling-mounted tunnel lights running along the top; a bright circular tunnel-exit portal ("light at the end of the tunnel") is visible straight ahead. The two-lane carriageway has a dashed centre line. On the right, a person in an orange shirt stands on the raised sidewalk/walkway at the tunnel area, with an arm extended toward the car (hailing it, as a passenger wanting to be picked up). No numbered figures or multiple vehicles — a single ego-vehicle POV plus one pedestrian.
determine.reasoning: Question: "Чи дозволено зупинитися в цьому місці для посадки пасажирів?" Options: [0] "Дозволено." [1] "Заборонено." [2] "Дозволено тільки в світлий час доби." DB marks "Дозволено." (index 0). The verbatim question with this exact 3-option set is a documented official ПДР test item (Section 15, Зупинка і стоянка). Multiple Ukrainian driving-test sources analyzing this exact question (obozrevatel.com, companion.ua, pdrtest.com 15.10, pomahach.com 3548-38693 which matches the question text and options verbatim) converge on the marked answer "Дозволено." The official rationale: п. 15.9(в) prohibits stopping IN a tunnel, but the designated passenger-boarding stop here is at/before the tunnel area where that prohibition does not bind, so stopping for passenger boarding is permitted — and it is NOT limited to daylight hours (so option 2 is wrong; option 1 "Заборонено" contradicts the situation). The genConcern itself only disputes options 1 and 2, not the marked answer. Caveat: our rendered image reads strongly as a tunnel interior (POV from inside the bore), which on a naive read could suggest "Заборонено"; however this is the standard official illustration for this permitted-stop item and the verbatim question's authoritative answer is "Дозволено." Hence verdict key_correct.
determine.sources: https://pomahach.com/question/3548-38693/chi-dozvoleno-zupinitisya-v-comu-misci-dlya-posadki-pasazhiriv/ (verbatim question text + identical 3 options: "Дозволено тільки в світлий час доби" / "Дозволено" / "Заборонено", correct highlighted green); https://www.obozrevatel.com/ukr/avto-oboz/chi-mozhna-zupinitisya-dlya-posadki-pasazhiriv-zavdannya-z-pdr.htm (official answer "Дозволяється/Дозволено"; п.15.9 bans stopping inside tunnel, not before it); https://companion.ua/chy-dozvolena-zupynka-pered-tunelem-dlia-posadky-pasazhyriv/ (same question, tunnel + passenger boarding, allowed); https://pdrtest.com/question/15.10 and https://pdrtest.com/questions/16 (Section 15 tunnel stop variant, answer "Дозволено"); ПДР п.15.9(в) "Зупинка забороняється ... у тунелях".

determine.imageDescription: The diagram has two numbered pictures side by side, taken from a driver's first-person view down a road in a populated area. Picture 1 (left, labeled "1"): two passenger cars standing on the carriageway; the left side of the road has a wide white-edged marked strip/sidewalk area, but there is NO one-way road sign — this is a two-way road. Picture 2 (right, labeled "2"): two passenger cars standing on the road, and a blue square "one-way road" sign (road sign 5.5 — blue square with a white upward arrow) is displayed beside the picture, indicating a one-way street.
determine.reasoning: Question 15.38: "На якому з малюнків транспортні засоби поставлені правильно на дорогах у населених пунктах?" Options: [0] "На першому.", [1] "На другому.", [2] "На обох." DB marks "На другому." (index 1). Per ПДР п. 15.9, in populated areas stopping/parking on the LEFT side of the road is permitted only on roads with one lane in each direction (no tram tracks) OR on one-way roads. Picture 2 carries the blue one-way-road sign (5.5), so the vehicles' placement there is legal. Picture 1 is a two-way road with no one-way sign, so the placement is not permitted — therefore "На обох" is wrong and only the second picture is correct. The diagram + rule + two independent authoritative Ukrainian test sources all confirm "На другому". DB marked answer matches.
determine.sources: Web search summaries from green-way.com.ua/uk/test-pdd/twenty-questions/4662, pdrtest.com/question/15.38, pomahach.com/question/3589-22323/, manualov.net/online-test-pdr.php?question=520 (redirects to testpdr.online/test.php?test=all&q=520), and vodiy.ua (Зупинка і стоянка). Two independent WebSearch result summaries explicitly stated the official correct answer is "На другому" (On the second). Direct page fetches of pdrtest.com returned HTTP 429 (rate-limited) and other pages render the answer only via a green highlight not present in extracted text, but the search-engine snapshots of these official-base ticket pages consistently report "На другому".
